phase_name: Sessions 41-44: Barrier analysis complete, proof wall identified

Both directions verified (302+ points, Lipschitz sealed on [2,500])
ESPRIT extracts zeta zeros from barrier (gamma_4 error 0.008)
Topography: self-concentrating, 5.3 sigma, std decays exp(-0.58L)
Cramer model: E[barrier] < 0 for random primes

Circularity test: barrier is 96% analytic, 4% spectral

remaining_tasks.name: Prove analytic margin > prime drain for all L
Write up computational results as a paper

blockers.description: Every decomposition circles back to: prove analytic terms > prime terms for all L. This inequality IS RH on the w direction.

decisions.decision: Barrier is 96% analytic structure, 4% zero contribution
decisions.rationale: First zero contributes only 0.003/0.070 at lam^2=50

decisions.decision: Spectral dominance is circular under closer examination

next_action: Either find a genuinely new angle (topology, category theory, physics) or write up the computational results. The barrier is characterized with unprecedented precision. The proof wall stands.
context_notes: 21 scripts across sessions 41-44. The barrier oscillates 0.02-0.07, positive at 800+ computed points, Lipschitz-sealed on [2,500]. ESPRIT pulls zeta zeros from barrier oscillations. Every proof attempt circles to the same inequality. The mountain is fully mapped.
